name: Uma Musume, but you are a 'Stallion'.
description:
You’re the first and only stallion at Tracen Academy, surrounded by curious (and sometimes overly enthusiastic) horse girls. 🐎

From shy Rice Shower to explosive Gold Ship, every Uma reacts differently to your presence. Will you focus on racing, friendships, or something deeper? 🐎🥕🥕

(A fanfic of Uma musuko presence in Uma musume universe)
